w:r.w:t: This agreement (hereinafter Agreement) is entered into this [CONTRACT DATE] by and between [NAME OF THE CLUB] (hereafter called “Club”) a basketball organization located in [ADDRESS OF THE CLUB ]and participating in the [NAME OF THE LEAGUES]
– professional basketball player residing in [ADDRESS OF THE LEAGUES] (hereinafter called “Player”)
Mr. [NUMBER OF THE AGENT], FIBA License # [FIBA LICENCE NUMBER] [AND NAME OF THE OTHER AGENT] (hereinafter called “Representative”)
In consideration of the mutual promises contained herein, the parties agree as follows:
This contract agreement for the Player is valid for [NUMBER OF SEASON] seasons

Subject to the terms of this agreement, the Club hereby confirms, and the Player agrees to the employment as a basketball player for the 2025/26 season [AND THE ADDITIONAL SEASON]. Such employment of the Player by the Club will include the Player’s participation in the Club´s regular season, play-off exhibition, tournament and friendly games and practices during the noted term. All obligations of the Player concerning his presence in the Club’s locale will cease 24 hours after the last official game of the Club for the Season {SEASON_1} and the Player will become immediately a free agent and his letter of clearance will be immediately released
Upon signing and successfully passing the medical exams the Club agrees to pay the Player the following:
SALARY]: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
SALARY: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes

Club and Player agree that Club shall have the right to give Player a standard physical examination no later than three (3) days after Player arrives in the country of the Club for the start of season [SEASON]. In case the Player fails the physical examination, the results of such physical exam shall be submitted to the Player and the Representative by Club in written form within two (2) days after the exam occurs and shall state the specific reason for such failure. If Player passes this exam, this Agreement shall be of full force and effect and be fully guaranteed as set forth below. If Player fails this physical examination, Club shall have the right either to repeat the exam within the next three (3) days or to terminate this Agreement by written notice to Player within two (2) days after the exam occurred. Upon Player’s receipt of such notice of termination, the Player shall have the right to ask to review the reasons of such failure and object to it in which case a third party doctor will need to be established by the Club in order to review the findings. In case the medicals are failed after the final review, this Agreement shall be terminated with neither party having any further obligations. Should Club fail to give Player this physical examination on the stated time period or fail to notify Player that he failed the physical exam or allows the Player to practice or play a game with the Club before the medical exams, Club shall have waived its right to such examination and termination right and Player shall be deemed to have passed such physical examination with this Agreement in full force and effect and remaining guaranteed.
Concerning the Player´s employment with the Club, the Club on behalf of the Player will make the following arrangements:
The Club will provide the Player with [NUMBER OF TICKET]
class round trip plane tickets per season for the needs of him and his family [COUNTRY OF THE TEAM]

The Club will provide an automobile for use by the Player during the term of this agreement. The Club shall also be responsible for purchasing automobile insurance at the highest possible level of protection for driver and passengers and third parties so that the Player shall be fully covered as driver of the automobile. Any amounts that the Player will need to pay because not covered by the insurance will be liability of the Club unless the Player was driving under the influence of alcohol or illegal drugs, his conduct was intentionally or grossly negligent. The Club will pay all maintenance expenses of the automobile. Gasoline is responsibility of the Player.
The Club will provide the Player with a fully furnished [NUMBER OF BEDROOM]

bedroom apartment, including high speed internet, for his exclusive use during the period of this agreement. The apartment has to be of the Player’s approval. The use of the telephone to make long distance calls and the cleaning of the apartment will be at the Player’s expense. All utilities (water, electricity, internet, etc) will be the at the Club’s expense and the Player is obligated to make reasonable use of them.
The Club will be responsible for and pay the costs of all hotel, travel and food expenses of the Player when the Player is traveling on behalf of the Club.

The Club will make all payments of taxes, levies, fees and other charges on behalf of the Player which are or may be in effect at any time anywhere in the country of the Club or in any other county or locale in which the Club plays or the Player is required by the Club to appear. All payments to the Player as outlined in this agreement will be free and clear (net) of all local, national or other taxes, levies or fees required to be paid in the country of the Club or any other locale or countries in which the Club appears. In addition, upon request of the Player or his representatives, the Club agrees to supply a certificate indicating that applicable taxes have been paid. In case that Club fails to provide a tax certificate and as a result the Player is charged with income taxes in his home country, the Club will be liable to pay those taxes to the Player within 5 days of request.

The Club will make all arrangements necessary within its country’s banking system to allow the Player to transfer funds to the bank account of the Player. All fees for any transfers of funds shall be paid by the Club.

The Club will pay for full medical and dental insurance for the Player and his immediate family (no cosmetics, unless necessary to Player because of injury arising out of services by Player) incurred by the Player and his family while this agreement is in force and while they are located in the country of the Club, or at a location as designated by the Club. Any medical or dental treatment expenses made in the Club’s country or in a location that the player appears on behalf of the Club shall be therefore the responsibility of the Club, and any medical or dental expenses (including cosmetic if required because of an injury while Player performing services) not covered by insurance shall be paid by the Club, unless arising from Player’s gross negligence or willful misconduct. In case of serious injury of the Player needing surgery, the Player shall have the right at his own expense to take a second opinion from a doctor of his choice. In case surgery is performed, the parties will choose together the doctor to perform it. In case the doctor is located outside of the Club’s country and unless the Club agrees to cover the expenses, the Player will be responsible for covering any amounts not covered by insurance.
The following individual bonuses will apply specifically to the player during the term of his agreement.
[AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
cumulative, and Player is entitled to only the highest amount in each
taxes and are due at the last day of the month

The Club agrees that this agreement and all of the payments required to be made to the Player are fully and unconditionally guaranteed. Therefore, such payments shall be made even in the event of death, injury (whether permanent or non-permanent and regardless of whether the injury is basketball related), mental disability or lack of skill. Accordingly, all payments required within are not contingent on anything other than the Player passing the medical exams of clause 2.2.

Should the Club desire that the Player depart prior to the scheduled termination of this agreement the Club is required to provide written notice to both the Player and Representative communicating this desire. Under no circumstance does this relieve the Club of their responsibilities to make all payments required under this agreement for all seasons under the agreement. Club cannot under any circumstances move the Player into a different position other than that of the player of the men’s team unless otherwise mutually agreed. Club cannot assign the Player to any junior team, or b team, and cannot demand that the Player follows a different training schedule than the rest of the team.
The PLAYER declares and undertakes that the Representative mediated for the completion
of this Agreement and will be compensated with an amount equal to:.
season: [AMOUNT OF THAT MONTH] net of any [COUNNAME OF THE COUNTRY] taxes
The full agency fee is considered fully earned and the services fully provided upon
The agency fee shall survive any premature expiration, expiration or termination of the Player’s contract and any expiration or termination of the Player-Agent agreement.
The Club agrees that in addition to any other payments mentioned in this Agreement, it will pay the Representative on behalf of the Player the above-mentioned amount.

Additionally, Club will compensate the Representative on behalf of the Player in case of any renewals/extensions of the present Agreement with a fee equal to 10% of the value of the renewal/extension contract regardless of a valid player-agent representation agreement at the time.

The Player also irrevocably authorizes the Agent in case of non payment of the Agency Fee to take any legal action, including arbitration as well as sub authorizing an attorney in order to collect said payment from the Club on behalf of the Player.
This agreement, or any of its inherent or implied considerations, cannot be assigned, sold, or transferred to any other Club without the written approval of the Player and the Representative.

The Player agrees to observe and comply with all reasonable requirements of the Club regarding the conduct of the basketball team and its players, provided that the said requirements are enforced against all Clubs’ players in a uniform non-discriminatory manner. In this regard the Player will upon presentation of the Club rules in writing and in English, review specific Club rules and sign receiving them.

Notwithstanding anything to the contrary in this agreement or the Club rules, the Player is permitted to play, practice, demonstrate or instruct basketball in connection with a camp or clinic and participate in off season seminars and/or educational activities.
This agreement may be translated in [COUNNAME]

(at the Club’s expense) for any purposes including legal requirements within the Club’s country. However, it is agreed that in the case of any controversy the English form will prevail. It is the responsibility of the Club to register this agreement with the local federation under the same terms. In case of any controversy the present Agreement in English will prevail.
season the Club has the right to terminate the present agreement for the season [SEASON 2]
by providing written notice to the Player and his Representatives (via email) within [NUMBER OF DAYS] days after the last official game for season [SEASON 2]
and by providing to the Player the amount of [TEAM BUY OUT AMOUNT] [CURRENCY]
taxes on or before the termination notice day. In order for the termination to be valid, all amounts payable to the Player for season [SEASON 1]

including the buy-out amount and the Agency Fee should be fully paid otherwise the termination will be invalid. In case such a notice is provided, the Club has no obligation towards the Player for season [SEASON 2]

and the Player is free to sign and play for any Club in the world with the Club being obligated to provide letter of clearance and release immediately. In the event the Club exercises this option, its will only be required to provide payment for the financial obligations of season 2025/26.
season the Player has the right to terminate the present agreement for the season [SEASON 2]
by providing written notice to the Club (via email) until [DATE OF THE BUY OUT].
In case the Player exercises this option, he or a third party on his behalf will have to deposit the amount of [PLAYER BUY OUT AMOUNT] [CURRENCY]

to the account designated in writing by the Club within 10 days from the notice. In case the Club provides the account information to the Player and the Player does not deposit the amount agreed, the Club can withhold the Letter of Clearance of the Player until the amount is paid. Once the amount is paid, the Club is obligated to release the Letter of Clearance of the Player immediately. In case there is any debt of the Club towards the Player or the Agents then this amount will be automatically deducted from the buy-out amounts and only the remaining amount will be payable.

The delay of 30 days in any of this Agreement’s payments will be considered as breach. In the event that any scheduled payments are not made by the Club within 30 days of the applicable payment date, the Player's performance obligations shall cease, Player or Representative shall have the right, at Player's or Representative’s option, to terminate this Agreement and to accelerate all future payments required for the full term of this Agreement and Player shall be free to leave the Club with his FIBA Letter of Clearance to play basketball anywhere in the world Player chooses, without any further payment obligations or duties to the Club, but the duties and liabilities of Club under this Agreement shall continue in full force and effect. Additionally, if any payment is overdue by more than 30 days, and even if Player does not give the notice of default under this Clause 10.1, Player will not be required to play or practice with the Club until all payments are made in full, and during such time, Player will not be considered in breach of this Agreement.
The Club agrees that the Player may terminate this agreement in the event that:
Any payment mentioned by this contract is past due more than thirty (30) days
Any non-economical clause is not performed by the Club for thirty (30) days or longer

In such either case 10.2.1 and 10.2.2, Player upon his or the Representative’s request will be granted his unconditional release and free agency to play in any Club in the world he wishes, without any further payment obligations or duties to the Club, and all monies due to the Player and/or the Representative during the entire term of his Agreement shall become immediately due and payable. Player is under no obligation to mitigate his damages and Club expressively agrees to waive any rights to receive an offset.

This agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties and there is no oral or written inducements, promises or agreements except as contained herein. All prior agreements or contracts are void upon signing this agreement.

It shall be the Club’s responsibility to register this agreement under the same terms with the Counname league and federation. In the event of any dispute for any reason between this one and the one registered with the league/federation, this Agreement will prevail. An alternate resolution clause of any League/federation contracts will not affect the validity of this Agreement and the dispute resolution provisions below. Any termination, alteration or waive of the rights under this Agreement will only be valid if it has specific reference to this Agreement.

Any dispute arising from or related to the present contract shall be submitted exclusively to the Basketball Arbitral Tribunal (BAT) in Geneva, Switzerland. No recourse to national courts of any country is allowed except for enforcing a BAT award in the locale of a party. If a Request for Arbitration is filed, the dispute shall be resolved in accordance with the BAT Arbitration Rules by a single arbitrator appointed by the BAT President. The arbitrator shall decide the dispute ex aequo et bono. Provided that the relevant requirements as set out in the BAT Arbitration Rules are met, each party may file a Payment Order Request instead of a Request for Arbitration. In such case, a Payment Order Procedure shall be conducted in accordance with the BAT Arbitration Rules. The parties acknowledge and agree that any Final Payment Order issued by the BAT President shall have the effects of a final and binding arbitral award between the parties to the dispute. In any case, the seat of the arbitration shall be Geneva, Switzerland. The arbitration shall be governed by Chapter 12 of the Swiss Act on Private International Law, irrespective of the parties' domicile. The language of the arbitration shall be English. The parties expressly waive recourse to the Swiss Federal Tribunal against awards of the BAT, as provided in Article 192 of the Swiss Act on Private International Law. The prevailing party shall be awarded his or its reasonable attorney’s fees as determined by BAT as well as interest according to late payment directives issued by the European parliament for commercial transactions from time to time. Should any of the parties not follow up any of their financial obligation and this generates a B.A.T. litigation case, the parties hereby irrevocably agree to bound the Arbitrator to upheld a clause which would be included in the operative part of the award that any amounts awarded through a B.A.T. award shall be subject of late penalty fees of 0.5% for each day of delay, should the B.A.T. award not be honoured in 10 days after it’s communication to the parties via e-mail, at the addresses mentioned in this agreement.

*Notices will be sent to legal@nsibasketball.com for the Player and the Representative and to [EMAIL ADDRESS] for the Club. In case of change of email address for any of the parties, the said party is responsible to notify the other about the change.
** The present contract can be digitally signed and exchanged via email. The presence of a digital copy instead of a hard copy remains fully valid.
[NAME OF THE AGENT], FIBA Licence #[FIBA LICENCE NUMBER]
